---
title: "‘A very friendly leaf.’"
---

## ‘A very friendly leaf.’

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1901
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i></i> (January 1901) 45-46.

### Notes

This series, \'Leaves for the Months\', is identified as by CMY in an obituary in <i>Friendly Leaves</i>, April 1901.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
